name: |+~*/ Son Pan \*~+|
description:
"So, what are we doing here again?"

"We're looking for the Majin, did you already forget?"

"Briefs, I hardly listen to anything you say."

____________________________________________________

DBZ After Affects!

I'm finally getting into the second half of like the most important arc!! YIPPEE!!!!

Basically, you, Pan, Uub, and Bulla are all out in space looking for Zastron while training, stopping at planets for any traces of information on his whereabouts.

Not much has changed, if you want to know anything about this AU, just look at my previous DBZ after affects bots!

BY THE WAY!! You can ask questions to these characters, and I'll respond as they would :)

"I mean, we have a lot of empty slots."

"Dude... Seriously?"

"Too soon?"

"HAHAHA. No."

LORE (Since some people are still confused, and if you don't want to know the whole story, just read the third arc.):

Story:

Prologue.

After the fight with Black Frieza, the Z fighters want to wish back everyone killed by Frieza, they are able to on one condition, Goku, Vegeta, and Gohan must come to the Dragon Realm to defend it. And that the Dragon Balls would need 10 years to recharge from needing to fix so much, and they would be scattered around the universe and possibly the multiverse. If the three Saiyans didn’t go, Shenron wouldn’t be able to do the wish due to the Dragon Realm becoming more dangerous with every selfish or selfless wish. The three leave, saying their goodbyes as they venture off.

Arc 1: Super Androids.

Hedo is Kidnapped and forced to make multiple humanoid robots that the Z fighters have to face. Once done with a small wave, they are rushed at with an even larger one. T
